name: Southwestern Home Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a mixing bowl, mix the whole potatoes with olive oil and salt and pepper.
3. Transfer the mixture to a baking pan and roast for 30 minutes or until slightly underdone.
4. Cool well and cut into quarters.
5. On a large griddle or in a large sauté pan, saute onion, garlic, and jalapeno in butter for 7 to 10 minutes. Do not brown the mixture.
6. Add the potatoes to the pan and cook for an additional 10 to 12 minutes or until they begin to brown.
7. Mix in chiles and cilantro. Serve hot.
